S01 E31 — Dark Star Little Joe falls for a girl who has been disowned by her people because they think she is a witch and, therefore, an outcast.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Banned from racing, a brash young driver (Mickey Rooney) returns to Indianapolis and burns up the track.
programme.title: The Big Wheel

programme.desc: A forest ranger (Christopher George) tries heavy firepower on a very big Georgia bear loose in a national park.
programme.title: Grizzly

programme.desc: A disturbed girl (Anne Baxter) with a heart condition moves in with her doctor and flirts with his married brother (Ralph Bellamy).
programme.title: Guest in the House

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: A singing comedian (Dean Martin) flops on his own, then soars with a sidekick (Jerry Lewis) but insists on hogging the show.
programme.title: The Stooge

programme.desc: Clumsy Inspector Jacques Clouseau (Peter Sellers) chases a jewel thief (David Niven) and his nephew (Robert Wagner).
programme.title: The Pink Panther

programme.desc: Bungling Inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) once again seeks the Pink Panther diamond and maddens his boss (Herbert Lom).
programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther

programme.desc: A novitiate leaves her convent and becomes governess to Capt. Von Trapp's seven children in Austria before World War II.
programme.title: The Sound of Music

programme.desc: For his fiancée's charity a stockbroker bets friends that for 24 hours he will tell only the truth.
programme.title: Nothing but the Truth

programme.desc: A songwriter (Dick Van Dyke) sees his big chance when rock 'n' roll idol Conrad Birdie visits Sweet Apple, Ohio, to give one last kiss to his biggest fan (Ann-Margret) before joining the Army.
programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie

programme.desc: A bachelor (Jerry Lewis) agrees to baby-sit for a Hollywood star (Marilyn Maxwell), who turns out to have triplets.
programme.title: Rock-a-Bye Baby

programme.desc: Friends, relatives and a lawyer (Moses Gunn) question the case of a ghetto basketball star slain by a white policeman.
programme.title: Cornbread, Earl and Me

programme.desc: The frontiersman (Bruce Bennett) leads settlers to Kentucky, where he makes peace with a Shawnee chief (Lon Chaney).
programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: An ex-convict (John Payne) is framed for a bank holdup done by a police captain (Preston Foster) and men wearing masks.
programme.title: Kansas City Confidential

programme.desc: When an outlaw (Lee Marvin) with a fake nose kills her father, a schoolmarm (Jane Fonda) hires his drunken twin to get revenge.
programme.title: Cat Ballou

programme.desc: Americans (Mark Stevens, Patric Knowles) try to smuggle gold from France to use against the British in the War of 1812.
programme.title: Mutiny

programme.desc: A couple (Dick Van Dyke, Debbie Reynolds) break up after 15 years of marriage, then get back together as the easy way out.
programme.title: Divorce American Style

programme.desc: White liberals must overcome their own latent racism when their strong-willed daughter announces her intention to marry a distinguished black physician.
programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner

programme.desc: During the Civil War, reports of a sea monster attacking ships alarm the Navy. An investigation finds the monster is a submarine, the "Nautilus," commanded by vengeance-seeking Capt. Nemo (Allen Holubar), who was once an Indian prince.
programme.title: 20,000 Leagues Under the Sea

programme.desc: Rock 'n' rollers (Chubby Checker, Gene Chandler, Vic Dana) put on a TV dance special.
programme.title: Don't Knock the Twist

Kasos,Greece Kasos, a small yet heroic island, has faced Troy, Persia, revolution, and war; its maritime tradition shapes autonomy, culture, and identity, while the sea brings both connection and peril in this journey from antiquity to today.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula White-Cain
programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Focus On The Family
programme.desc: Become a champion for your family in the time it takes to enjoy a cup of coffee! Every episode of the Focus on the Family Christian podcast helps you confidently guide your loved ones through the unique challenges faced by today’s Christian families. With over 40 years of trusted, compassionate stories of redemption, hosts Jim Daly and John Fuller connect you to biblically sound marriage and parenting help that is relatable, practical, and interesting. Listen/Learn/Apply/ThriveInChrist!

programme.desc: Let this program lift up your day. Write down the positive affirmations and repeat them throughout the day. programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: 2026 Make it your Best
programme.desc: Welcome to 2026 — a new chapter, not because the calendar has changed, but because you have the opportunity to choose differently. programme.title: 2026 Year of Spiritual Alignment
programme.desc: In this Life Coaching Session we delve into the deeper currents of your being. This is an invitation into stillness, a chance to realign with your true purpose and inner wisdom. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.
